name: Family Banking
description: Greenlight is a family-first fintech solution that helps kids & teens build smart money habits with a debit card & app. Partners benefit from an embedded, co-branded experience that drives engagement, attracts younger customers, & supports financial literacy.
tagLine: The smart money solution for families

name: Credit Score
description: Help your users understand their credit score, factors that impact it and how to strengthen it.
tagLine: Credit Score Solutions for Banks & Credit Unions

name: Continuous Verification
description:
Callsign makes digital identity seamless and secure, helping organizations build digital
trust and accountability into every online transaction. Callsign uniquely identifies
people across every digital interaction, journey and channel, protecting against threats
such as account takeover and online scams.

The first true representation of identity online, Callsign identifies users by their unique
characteristics. Our proprietary technology uses fraud models to detect bad actors
combined with the highest-fidelity AI models to build a digital DNA profile for each
user, emulating how people identify each other in the real world – letting people get on
with their digital life.

name: Demos and Tutorials
description: WaveCX provides personalized content, in-app messaging, interactive demos, and training tools to increase customer and employee engagement.

name: Digital Customer Service
description: Glia unifies voice, digital, and AI support to deliver seamless, co-piloted customer experiences without data silos or context loss.
tagLine: AI-Powered Interaction Platform for Voice & Digital

name: Website Accessibility
description: Candescent Website Accessibility Assistance, powered by AudioEye, provides efficient and cost-effective solutions for web accessibility compliance. We enhance usability with automated and engineering-generated tools to ensure inclusivity and manage accessibility effectively.

name: Purchase Rewards
description: Turn spending into rewards with Purchase Rewards! Cardmembers earn cashback on everyday purchases from top brands in retail, travel, and more—driving engagement, loyalty, and stronger connections. More rewards, more value, more loyalty.
tagLine: Loyalty Program providing targeted, cash-back offers

name: Personal Financial Management
description: Empower your users with tools to help improve their financial wellness and reach their financial goals.
tagLine: Connect financial accounts and surface insights from transaction data.

name: Transfer Now (CashEdge) External Transfers
description: TransferNow, formerly known as CashEdge, is Fiserv’s external account-to-account (A2A) transfer solution. It enables consumers and small businesses to securely move money between accounts at different financial institutions with flexible delivery options, including same-day and instant transfers. Built with advanced security, broad network connectivity, and seamless digital integration, TransferNow simplifies money movement while enhancing customer satisfaction.
tagLine: TransferNow - TransferNow A2A Platform: Moving Money Matters

name: Online Forms
description: Streamline workflows and create efficiencies by allowing users to fill out and submit information digitally.

name: Payrailz Payment Platform
description: The Jack Henry Payrailz® Payment Platform is a next-generation, cloud-native, API-first, AI-enabled solution that empowers financial institutions to deliver smarter, faster, and more personalized payment experiences. From real-time person-to-person (P2P) payments to intelligent bill pay and account transfers, Payrailz helps banks and credit unions stay competitive, reduce friction, and improve financial health for consumers and businesses alike.

name: Zelle and Zelle Small Business
description: As of March 2021, nearly 7,000 financial institutions are represented in the Zelle® Network based on their customers’ use of the Zelle® common mobile app (Source: Zelle® Network data) . With the FIS® Zelle® implementation, you can quickly add P2P payments to your mobile banking app’s capabilities.
tagLine: Experience higher engagement and transaction volumes

name: Digital Lending
description: Data-Driven Digital Lending, powered by MeridianLink®, delivers a cloud-based, data-centric platform that transforms how financial institutions originate loans and open accounts. With seamless integration, intelligent automation, and personalized experiences, this solution empowers banks and credit unions to grow relationships, increase efficiency, and stay compliant—while delivering the digital-first experiences today’s consumers expect.

name: Gamify Onboarding and Personalize Engagement
description: Banks and credit unions turn new accounts into active, primary relationships with Swaystack, a digital onboarding and engagement platform. Using gamified journeys inside digital banking and across email and SMS, financial institutions leverage Swaystack to guide new account holders to take the actions that matter most, like funding, switching direct deposit, and adopting key products.

name: Digital Invoicing and Payments
description: Upgrade digital banking for small businesses by providing the tools they need to run their business. Autobooks enables invoicing, payment acceptance and accounting as features of digital banking.

name: Takedown service
description: FraudAction provides detection and prevention of phishing and scams targeting your customers. We deliver customized cyberfraud intelligence like compromised card data to protect your customers, your reputation, and your bottom line

name: VOE/VOI
description: Accelerate account opening and funding with Plaid's instant account verification in Candescent, boosting conversion, engagement and security. Enable customers to connect accounts in seconds with best-in-class coverage and seamless ACH compatibility.

name: Promosuite Premium - Push and Email marketing
description: Offer a mobile-first, multi-message engagement platform.
tagLine: Mobile Engagement Platform for Financial Institutions

name: Payhub
description:
Paymentus PayHub is a unified, cloud-based platform that streamlines billing, payment, and customer communication for financial institutions and billers. With support for multiple payment types—including ACH, debit/credit cards, digital wallets, and real-time payments—PayHub empowers users to pay how and when they want.
The platform delivers a seamless omnichannel experience across web, mobile, IVR, and in-person interactions, while providing billers with advanced analytics, automated notifications, and robust reconciliation tools. By consolidating services into a single, scalable hub, PayHub reduces complexity, enhances customer satisfaction, and drives operational efficiency.

name: Bill Pay
description: Give your users peace of mind to seamlessly move money via bill pay, P2P payments and more.

name: eStatements
description: Fiserv eStatements—featuring Statement Advantage and Statement Express—deliver secure, paperless financial statements through online and mobile banking. These solutions enhance customer engagement, reduce operational costs, and support sustainability. Statement Advantage transforms statements into personalized communication tools with marketing messages, while Statement Express provides simple, secure access with historical archives and email alerts.
tagLine: Digital delivery for secure financial statements

name: Zelle, Zelle SMB
description: Enable users to send, request, or receive money with Candescent Digital Banking.
tagLine: Zelle® with Fiserv – A fast, easy, and secure way to send and receive money

name: Digital Storefront/Loan Engine
description: Through Digital Storefront, financial institutions can determine which tailored offers they want to present to consumers, such as Certificate of Deposits, pre-approved loans, GAP provisional quoting, insurance, and credit cards.

name: Bill Pay
description: Synchronize all your transactional activities, payment, treasury, and financial networks with efficient digital experiences, reducing costs and eliminating inefficiencies. With predictability and visibility into your transactions, have confidence in increasing volumes without sacrificing speed, accuracy, or security.
tagLine: Bringing the world’s money into harmony

name: Credit Card Payments
description: With EPX Powered by North point of sale systems, payment processing and merchant services, we have everything you need to take your business straight to the top.

name: Online Appointment Scheduling
description: Engageware’s Online Appointment Scheduling platform empowers organizations to deliver high-value customer engagement by making it easy for prospects and clients to book time with the right resources—at the right moment. With omnichannel access, smart routing, and seamless calendar integration, Engageware helps businesses increase operational efficiency, reduce no-shows, and improve every stage of the customer journey.

name: Open Finance
description: The Ninth Wave / Candescent integration allows bank customers to remain in preferred business applications to perform daily reconciliation and payment initiation processes, without screen-scraping and manual uploads of data.

name: Digital Investing
description: Enables banks and credit unions to retain assets, increase deposits, and deepen member relationships by keeping investing on-platform.

name: Direct-Deposit Switching
description:
Direct deposits are the foundation of long-term account growth and profitability.
Users can effortlessly move paychecks to your institution—without ever leaving the app.

name: Financial Wellness
description: Zogo Finance offers a gamified financial wellness platform that teaches users personal finance concepts through bite-sized lessons and rewards them for learning.

name: Positive Pay
description: Advanced Fraud Solutions (AFS) delivers omnichannel fraud defense, preventing check, ACH, and wire fraud before it impacts your bottom line. Our next-gen Positive Pay solution provides ironclad protection for high-value business accounts, reducing risk and reputational damage.
tagLine: Check, ACH, and Reverse Positive Pay

name: Transaction Monitoring - Anomaly Detection
description: Real-Time Anomaly Detection for Retail and Business powered by NICE Actimize Xceed provides a comprehensive, API-based real-time fraud monitoring and prevention solution for retail and business digital banking. Prevent unauthorized payments with the most accurate risk-scoring and the lowest false-positive rates available.

name: ATM Location Services
description: Wave2 delivers a mobile-first ATM & branch locator with an exceptional user experience, auto-updated multi-network location data, WCAG 2.2 ADA accessibility, seamless integration into websites and digital banking, and detailed tracking and reporting.”

name: Digital Customer Service
description: LinkLive is an AI-enabled, all-in-one communications and contact center platform trusted by the world’s most highly regulated industries to securely connect with consumers in the channels of their choice: voice, video, chat, email.

name: Chatbot - Virtual Assistance
description: Kasisto uses trusted generative AI to boost digital engagement and answer 90% of inquiries, transforming experiences for 50M+ customers.

name: TurboTax - Online Tax Preparation
description: Position your institution as a trusted advisor, providing access to a leading tax solution.  Keep every dollar you deserve this tax season. With TurboTax your maximum refund is guaranteed, whether you choose to have an expert file for you, file with expert help, or file yourself with AI-powered guidance along the way.

name: eStatements
description: InfoIMAGE delivers trusted, cost-effective document and data solutions—like statements, tax forms, and marketing—seamlessly integrated with major core systems since 1984.
tagLine: Printing and digital financial document delivery

name: RDC
description: Give consumers and businesses the freedom to conveniently deposit checks at home, in the office or on the go from their mobile devices.
